name: observent
description: Production-grade observability for multi-agent Python apps. Supports LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen v0.4, Anthropic Agents SDK, OpenAI Agents SDK, smolagents, and LlamaIndex × Arize Phoenix, Langfuse, and SigNoz.

plugins.name: observent
plugins.description: Wire up observability for your multi-agent Python app in one command. 8 frameworks × 3 backends, correct span hierarchy and context propagation out of the box.
